title: 2070 Commercial Drive, Port Allen, LA - Planning & Zoning

communications.subject: Louisiana Public Records Law Request: 2070 Commercial Drive, Port Allen, LA - Planning & Zoning
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Louisiana Public Records Law, I hereby request the following records:

I am requesting an opportunity to obtain copies of public records relating to the property located at 2070 Commercial Drive, Port Allen, LA.
Specifically, I am requesting the following records created, submitted, or received for the current warehouse facility, as well as any of these records related to retrofitting this site within the past year.

- All building permits, renovation permits, variance requests, or "Change of Use" applications filed for the aforementioned property.
- All code compliance inspection reports, certificates of occupancy, and violation notices regarding the property.
- Any site plans, architectural drawings, or engineering evaluations submitted by the property owner, their LLC, or the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) regarding retrofitting the facility.

To expedite this request and reduce the administrative burden on your office, I am requesting these records in their native electronic format (e.g., PDF for documents, .PST or .EML for emails) delivered via email or secure download link.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 3 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Gavin Laughland

title: 8660 Transport Drive, Orlando, Florida Planning & Zoning

communications.subject: Florida Sunshine Law Request: 8660 Transport Drive, Orlando, Florida Planning & Zoning
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Florida Sunshine Law, I hereby request the following records:

I am requesting an opportunity to obtain copies of public records relating to the property located at 8660 Transport Drive, Orlando, Florida.
Specifically, I am requesting the following records created, submitted, or received for the Beachline Logistics Center, as well as any of these records related to retrofitting this site within the past year.

- All building permits, renovation permits, variance requests, or "Change of Use" applications filed for the aforementioned property.
- All code compliance inspection reports, certificates of occupancy, and violation notices regarding the property.
- Any site plans, architectural drawings, or engineering evaluations submitted by the property owner, their LLC, or the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) regarding retrofitting the facility.

To expedite this request and reduce the administrative burden on your office, I am requesting these records in their native electronic format (e.g., PDF for documents, .PST or .EML for emails) delivered via email or secure download link.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 business days.

Sincerely,

Gavin Laughland
